accountant:
We are looking for an Accountant to join our finance team.

Responsibilities:
- Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, journal entries, and general ledger reconciliations
- Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable cycles end-to-end
- Produce monthly, quarterly, and year-end financial statements
- Support audits, tax filings, and regulatory compliance
- Analyze variances against budgets and forecasts and report findings to management

Requirements:
- 3+ years of accounting or bookkeeping experience
- Proficiency with GAAP and double-entry accounting principles
- Hands-on experience with accounting software (QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, or Oracle)
- Strong Excel skills: pivot tables, VLOOKUP, financial modeling
- Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
- Attention to detail and strong reconciliation skills

Nice to Have:
- CPA certification or active candidacy
- Experience with month-end close automation and ERP implementations
apparel:
We are hiring an Apparel Merchandiser / Product Developer to drive seasonal collections from concept to retail.

Responsibilities:
- Develop seasonal product assortments aligned with brand strategy and trend forecasts
- Manage the product lifecycle from tech pack through sampling, fit approval, and production
- Partner with overseas factories on costing, sourcing, and quality control
- Analyze sell-through, margin, and inventory data to inform future buys
- Coordinate with design, sourcing, and retail merchandising teams on line plans

Requirements:
- 3+ years in apparel merchandising, buying, or product development
- Strong understanding of garment construction, fabrics, trims, and grading
- Experience reading tech packs and managing PLM systems
- Familiarity with retail math: markup, margin, sell-through, open-to-buy
- Excellent vendor communication and negotiation skills
- Bachelor's degree in Fashion Merchandising, Design, or related field

Nice to Have:
- Overseas sourcing or factory-floor experience
- Adobe Illustrator and color/pattern software proficiency
banking:
Join our commercial bank as a Banking Associate supporting client relationships and credit operations.

Responsibilities:
- Process loan applications, wire transfers, and account servicing requests
- Conduct credit analysis and underwriting support for commercial clients
- Ensure KYC, AML, and regulatory compliance on all transactions
- Build and maintain client relationships, resolving escalated issues
- Prepare portfolio reports, risk reviews, and pipeline updates for senior bankers

Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience in retail, commercial, or investment banking
- Strong understanding of credit risk, loan structuring, and financial statement analysis
- Familiarity with banking regulations (Dodd-Frank, BSA/AML, KYC)
- Proficiency with core banking platforms and Microsoft Excel
- Excellent client-facing communication and relationship management skills
- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, or Business

Nice to Have:
- Series 6/7/63 licenses or CFA progress
- Experience with Bloomberg, Moody's, or S&P Capital IQ
finance:
We are seeking a Finance Analyst to support FP&A and strategic decision-making.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain financial models for budgeting, forecasting, and scenario analysis
- Partner with business units to produce monthly variance and KPI reporting
- Support capital allocation, M&A due diligence, and investment decisions
- Develop dashboards and present insights to senior leadership
- Drive process improvements in planning, consolidation, and reporting cycles

Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience in corporate finance, FP&A, or investment banking
- Advanced Excel and financial modeling skills (three-statement, DCF, LBO)
- Strong grasp of accounting fundamentals and valuation methods
- Experience with ERP/BI tools (SAP, Oracle, Hyperion, Tableau, Power BI)
- Excellent analytical, written, and executive-communication skills
- Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Accounting, or related field

Nice to Have:
- CFA, CPA, or MBA
- SQL or Python for finance automation
research_assistant:
We are recruiting a Research Assistant to support ongoing academic and applied research projects.

Responsibilities:
- Conduct literature reviews and synthesize findings across peer-reviewed sources
- Collect, clean, and analyze quantitative and qualitative data sets
- Support survey design, participant recruitment, and IRB documentation
- Draft sections of research papers, grant applications, and conference posters
- Maintain organized project documentation, code, and data repositories

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in a relevant discipline (social sciences, life sciences, or quantitative field)
- 1+ years of research experience in an academic, lab, or think-tank setting
- Proficiency with statistical software (R, SPSS, Stata, or Python)
- Strong academic writing, citation management (Zotero, EndNote), and literature-review skills
- Detail-oriented with demonstrated ability to manage multiple concurrent projects
- Experience with Excel and basic data visualization

Nice to Have:
- Publications, conference presentations, or thesis work
- Experience with qualitative coding software (NVivo, Atlas.ti) or wet-lab protocols
teacher:
We are hiring a Teacher to deliver engaging instruction and support student growth.

Responsibilities:
- Plan and deliver standards-aligned lessons across assigned grade levels and subjects
- Assess student progress through formative and summative assessments
- Differentiate instruction for diverse learners, including IEP and ELL students
- Maintain classroom management, positive culture, and family communication
- Collaborate with grade-level teams on curriculum, data analysis, and PD

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Education or subject area, plus state teaching certification
- 2+ years of full-time classroom teaching experience
- Strong lesson-planning, classroom-management, and differentiation skills
- Experience with standards-based grading and assessment design
- Familiarity with LMS platforms (Google Classroom, Canvas, Schoology)
- Excellent communication with students, parents, and colleagues

Nice to Have:
- Master's degree in Education or subject specialty
- ESL, special education, or advanced placement endorsements
software engineer:
We are looking for a Software Engineer to join our team.

Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services
- Write clean, well-tested, production-ready code
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams on system architecture
- Participate in code reviews and mentor junior engineers
- Debug and resolve production issues

Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience in software development
- Proficiency in Python, Java, or Go
- Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and system design
- Experience with REST APIs, microservices, and SQL databases
- Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure)
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent

Nice to Have:
- Experience with Kubernetes, Kafka, or Redis
- Contributions to open-source projects
